message1: %1 mustered their courage and tried to attack the monster!
message2: ...But their body froze in fear, and they couldn't move...
name: Attack
note: スキル1番は攻撃コマンドに対応します。

name: Defend
note: スキル2番は防御コマンドに対応します。

description:
Below are the skill slots to be displayed above combat skills when the
menu is opened.
name: -----Reserve

description: Curl up as small as possible to protect yourself.
message1: %1 crouched down and curled into a small ball...
name: Curl Up
note: スキル2番は防御コマンドに対応します。

description: Seduces a single enemy, lowering their abilities.
name: Temptation

description: Observe the situation.
name: Space Out

description: Attacks a single enemy multiple times in succession.
name: Multi-Strike

description: Attacks a random single enemy twice.
name: Double Attack

description: Attacks a random single enemy three times.
name: Triple Attack

description: The user withdraws from battle.
name: Escape

description: Observe the situation.
name: Observe

description: Absorbs HP from a single enemy.
name: Bloodsuck

description: Restores the user's HP.
name: Meditation

description: Stabs a single enemy with a paralysis needle, inflicting paralysis.
name: Paralysis Needle

description: Deals damage to a single enemy and throws them off balance.
name: Body Slam

description: Deals Thunder-element damage to a single enemy and inflicts paralysis.
name: Electric Shock

description: Coats a single enemy in slime, lowering their agility.
name: Slime

description: Sprays a single enemy with poison, inflicting poison.
name: Poison Spray

description: Rouses the user's fighting spirit, enhancing their abilities.
name: Roar

description: Deals damage to a single enemy's MP.
name: Strange Dance

description: Glares at a single enemy, inflicting paralysis.
name: Paralyzing Glare

description: Blinds a single enemy.
name: Blinding Strike

description: Rouses the user's fighting spirit, enhancing their abilities.
name: Intimidate

description: Blinds all enemies.
name: Flash

description: Poisons all enemies.
name: Poison Mist

description: Puts a single enemy to sleep.
name: Sleep

description: Charms all enemies.
name: Seductive Song

description: Seals the magic of all enemies.
name: Silencing Song

description: Deals Dark-element damage to all enemies.
name: Primordial Secret Art

description: Deals Earth attribute damage to all enemies.
name: Stone Pellet

description: Deals Wind attribute damage to all enemies.
name: Sickle Weasels

description: Deals Fire attribute damage to all enemies.
name: Fire Breath

description: Deals Ice attribute damage to all enemies.
name: Ice Breath

description: Deals Earth attribute damage to all enemies.
name: Earthquake

description: Deals Thunder attribute damage to all enemies.
name: Thunderbolt

description: Deals damage to a single enemy.
name: Scratch

description: Deals Dark attribute damage to a single enemy.
name: Ancient Demon Clan Secret Art

description: Deals Dark attribute damage to all enemies.
name: Forgotten Secret Art

description: Deals Dark attribute damage to all enemies.
name: Cursed Eye

description: Does not deal Dark attribute damage to a single enemy.
message2: But the pupil could not maintain its form and melted away into the air...
name: Cursed Eye (Failed)

message1: %1 is just quietly staring this way...
name: Silence

description: Deals non-attribute damage to a single enemy.
name: Magic Pellet

message1: %1 begins chanting the ancient curse once more...
name: Incantation

description: Deals non-attribute damage to a single enemy.
name: Magic Meteor

description: Restores HP for a single ally.
name: Heal

description: Restores HP for all allies.
name: Heal All

description: Restores HP for a single ally. Does not consume a turn.
name: Quick Heal

description: Restores a very large amount of HP for a single ally.
name: Great Heal

description: Restores a small amount of HP for a single ally each turn.
name: Regen

description: Restores HP for a single ally each turn.
name: Great Regen

description: Cures status ailments for a single ally.
name: Cure

description: Cures all status ailments except K.O. for all allies.
name: Cure All

description: Revives a single ally from K.O.
name: Raise

description: Revives a single ally from K.O. and fully restores their HP.
name: Resurrection

description: Cures status ailments for a single ally. Does not consume a turn.
name: Quick Cure

description: Poisons all enemies.
name: Poison

description: Blinds all enemies.
name: Blind

description: Inflicts Confusion on all enemies.
name: Confuse

description: Seals the magic of all enemies.
name: Silence

description: Inflicts Sleep on all enemies.
name: Sleep

description: Inflicts Fear on all enemies.
name: Terror

description: Raises a single ally's Attack for 3 turns. Does not consume a turn.
name: Enchant Sword

description:
Lowers all enemies' Attack and Defense for 5 turns. Does not consume a
turn.
name: Acid Rain

description: Raises own Magic Power for 5 turns.
name: Meditation

description: Lowers all enemies' Magic Power. Can be stacked up to 2 times.
name: Old Curse

description: Raises a single ally's Defense and Magic Defense for 5 turns.
name: Hexproof

description: Deals Holy attribute damage to a single enemy.
name: Holy

description: Deals major Holy attribute damage to a single enemy.
name: Saint Flare

description: Deals extreme Holy attribute damage to all enemies.
name: Divine Light
